---
name: MLS Pages
description: Use when editing MLS pages such as mls.html, mls-search.html, or mls-imports-spreadsheet.html.
applyTo: "mls*.html"
---

- Preserve existing MLS workflow behavior across search, spreadsheet import, and template/copy helpers.
- Be careful with user-scoped localStorage keys and legacy alias migration so saved MLS templates do not appear missing for Isaac's canonical email aliases.
- Prefer additive UI and workflow changes over reworking the spreadsheet/import flow.
- Keep legal/disclaimer assumptions aligned with the current MLS data handling pages.
